examples: This mysterious but teachable quality is creativity, the subject of a recently published report by the Durham Commission on Creativity and Education.
The most cutting-edge tool under development is the "teachable agent"— a computerized character who learns, tries, makes mistakes and asks questions just like a real-world pupil.

This may be a teachable moment because of the October jobs report that came out Friday.
